name: basic-engineering
description: Engineering toolkit — 29 composable skills, 7 agents, 13 rules, 7 hooks. SDLC orchestrator (8 stages) + ship-n-check orchestrator (8 stages) with standalone stage skills. Framework stacks: NestJS, Next.js, Django. Mode switching (dev/research/review). Context budget analysis, strategic compaction, continuous learning (instincts), autonomous loop patterns. Language-specific rules for TypeScript, Python, Go. Git safety and quality hooks.
